metadata.description: Two skills for Claude Code: a plan-first/test-first workflow for existing projects, and a PRD-first bootstrap flow for new projects. Behavioral principles derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations.

plugins.name: the-ultimate-workflow-guidelines
plugins.description: Plan-first, test-first workflow plus behavioral principles (Think Before Coding, Simplicity First, Surgical Changes, Goal-Driven Execution), plus a separate project-bootstrap-guidelines skill for greenfield work.
